questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the JSP directive `<%@ page %>` in a Java Server Page?
questions.hint: Describe the purpose of the directive

questions.question: Compare and contrast the usage of `request` and `response` objects in a JSP. Provide an example of when to use each.
questions.hint: Explain the difference and provide examples

questions.question: What is the purpose of the `import` directive at the top of a JSP file? How does it impact the compilation process?
questions.hint: Describe the role of the import directive
